stories.title: WCF Game 6 TONIGHT — Spurs Face Elimination at AT&T Center
stories.angle: High-stakes elimination game. Wembanyama's bounce-back game on the line. Fox's health a wildcard. The Thunder carry momentum and a blueprint.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
WCF GAME 6 — TONIGHT.

Spurs face elimination at AT&T Center, San Antonio.
8:30 PM ET | NBC/Peacock

Thunder lead 3-2. Wembanyama shot 4-of-15 last game.
He bounces back tonight — or the season is over.

#HoopHeroes #PorVida #ThunderUp #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
De'Aaron Fox: questionable. Wembanyama: bouncing back.

The Spurs need EVERYTHING tonight.

AT&T Center | 8:30 PM ET | NBC/Peacock
Series: Thunder 3, Spurs 2

#HoopHeroes #PorVida #NBAPlayoffs

stories.title: Wembanyama's NBA Warning After Game 5 Media Snub
stories.angle: Frustration boiling over. When Wembanyama is angry, he tends to produce.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
The NBA officially warned Victor Wembanyama.

After his 4-of-15 Game 5 performance, Wemby skipped his required
postgame media availability.

The league issued a formal warning. Expect a different Wembanyama tonight.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

stories.title: De'Aaron Fox Ankle — Spurs' Biggest Wildcard for Game 6
stories.angle: Fox's health is the difference between a Game 6 win and elimination.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
De'Aaron Fox status for WCF Game 6: QUESTIONABLE.

Fox missed Games 1 and 2 with a right ankle sprain.
He's back but battling.

Without Fox: Spurs struggle. With Fox: series completely changes.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

stories.title: Knicks Open as NBA Finals Underdogs — +215 vs Thunder
stories.angle: The Knicks are underdogs for the first time in this postseason. That narrative fires them up.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Knicks are the underdogs.

DraftKings has New York at +215 against OKC in the NBA Finals.

That's after an 11-game win streak, 8+ days of rest,
and a recovering OG Anunoby.

#HoopHeroes #Knicks #NBAFinals

stories.title: OKC Thunder One Win from Back-to-Back NBA Finals
stories.angle: This is a dynasty in the making — and tonight is the next chapter.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The defending champion Thunder are one win from the NBA Finals.

OKC won the title last year. SGA is averaging over 30 pts in these playoffs.

One game. Finals or Game 7.

#HoopHeroes #ThunderUp #NBAPlayoffs
